executive_summary: In highlight coverage, our latest chapter of the New Rails Report featuring crypto compliance benchmarking and agentic payments has driven widespread coverage across Yahoo Finance, CoinMarketCap, TradingView, crypto.news and others. Our analysis on the latest Nobitex sanctions was also featured in a New York Times article, among other media titles. In crypto news, narratives across stablecoin infrastructure, sanctions enforcement and agentic payments continue to dominate headlines.

narratives.title: Institutional Surveillance Outpaces Exchange Vigilance
narratives.description: Financial institutions now monitor crypto transactions more aggressively than exchanges themselves. Compliance standards among institutions rising faster than platform defenses.

narratives.title: Stablecoin Infrastructure & Quadrillion-Dollar Payment Future
narratives.description: Stablecoins could process $1.5 quadrillion annually by 2035. Turkish lira and emerging-market tokens proliferating; dollar dominance cement via stablecoin rails.

narratives.title: Sanctions Enforcement & Iran Crypto Crackdown Intensification
narratives.description: US seized $1B in Iranian crypto assets; sanctioned Nobitex and major exchanges. OFAC enforcement against evasion routes tightening with regulatory coordination.
narratives.relevance: Our sanctions attribution and evasion detection directly support government enforcement actions—positioning us as critical infrastructure for compliance regimes.

market_landscape.title: Bitcoin Volatility & Macro Headwinds
market_landscape.body: Bitcoin ETF outflows ($2.8B in longest streak) and six-week lows amid geopolitical tensions (Iran conflict, Middle East jitters) underscore macro fragility. Inflation-hedging thesis under pressure as traditional macro dominates price action.

market_landscape.title: TradFi-Crypto Regulatory Convergence
market_landscape.body: Binance stock/ETF trading, Coinbase rupee integration, and Vanguard ETF scaling signal TradFi is replicating crypto's playbook while regulators (CFTC undoing Gemini settlement) maintain enforcement intensity. Institutional adoption accelerating despite—or because of—tighter compliance baselines.

market_landscape.title: Stablecoins as Geopolitical Dollar Tool
market_landscape.body: Emerging-market stablecoin adoption (yen, Turkish lira, Indian rupee) and ECB concerns over dollar dominance reveal stablecoins as new-era FX rails. Regulatory arbitrage and Central Bank Digital Currency competition intensifying alongside illicit finance crackdowns.
